market_context:
Cohort size: 50 listings scraped in the same market.
Median nightly rate: £104.90
Median 90-day occupancy: 48.9%
Median photo count: 23

analysis.rewritten_desc: Experience the perfect blend of style and convenience in this stunning first-floor apartment, located in the heart of Sheffield. With its modern design and thoughtful touches, this one-bedroom flat is ideal for couples or solo travellers looking to explore the city. Enjoy the comforts of home, including a fully equipped kitchen, washing machine, and Wi-Fi. Take advantage of the self-check-in and lockbox for a seamless arrival. Pets are also welcome, making this the perfect retreat for all. With 14 photos showcasing the property, you can get a true sense of this fantastic space.
analysis.photo_order_rec: The cover photo should be the Exterior photo, as it sets the scene and provides an initial impression of the property's location and appearance.
key_diagnosis: The listing's nightly rate of £65.4 is 38% below the cohort median of £104.90, which may be contributing to the 32.6% occupancy rate
The listing has 14 photos, which is below the median photo count of 23 in the cohort, potentially impacting visibility and attractiveness
The listing has 0 reviews, which may be affecting its visibility and credibility, especially compared to other listings in the cohort
analysis.outreach_hook: With a nightly rate 38% below the cohort median and an occupancy rate of 32.6%, there may be opportunities to optimize the listing and increase bookings
